auth.label: OOMOL API Key
auth.description: OOMOL API key sent with the Authorization Bearer header to https://fusion-api.oomol.com. Create or manage keys from the OOMOL console API keys page.

actions.name: cosyvoice_tts_generate
actions.description: Generate speech audio with CosyVoice TTS.

model.description: Speech synthesis model. Different models support different voices.

text.description: Text content to synthesize into speech. SSML and LaTeX are supported.

voice.description: Voice name, cloned voice ID, or voice design name compatible with the selected model.

volume.description: Audio volume. Use 50 for standard volume.

rate.description: Speech rate. Use 1.0 for standard speed.

bitRate.description: Audio bit rate in kbps. Only opus format supports this field.

pitch.description: Speech pitch. Use 1.0 for natural pitch.

languageHints.description: Target language hints. The current API recommends passing at most one value.

instruction.description: Instruction that controls dialect, emotion, role, or other synthesis style.

enableAIGCTag.description: Whether to add an invisible AIGC tag to the generated audio.

AIGCPropagator.description: ContentPropagator value for the invisible AIGC tag.

AIGCPropagateID.description: PropagateID value for the invisible AIGC tag.

hotFix.description: Text hotfix configuration for pronunciation and replacement.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Fusion API action result.

data.description: Task result data returned by Fusion API.

anyOf.description: The Fusion API task completed with result data.

progress.description: Task progress reported by Fusion API.

anyOf.description: The Fusion API task is still processing.

error.description: Error message returned by Fusion API.

anyOf.description: The Fusion API task was not found.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Fusion API task result.

imageSize.description: Generated image resolution, only supported by nano-banana-2

sessionId.description: Task session ID used by result and state actions.

URL.description: Webpage URL whose content should be fetched

engine.description: Rendering engine type: direct for static fetching and browser for dynamic rendering

jsonResponse.description: Whether to return the result in JSON format

timeout.description: Page load wait timeout in seconds

tokenLimit.description: Maximum number of tokens to return

useReaderLMV2.description: Whether to use the ReaderLM-v2 model for HTML-to-Markdown conversion

selectorOnly.description: Only extract content matching this CSS selector

selectorWait.description: Wait for the element matching this CSS selector before extraction

selectorNone.description: Remove elements matching this CSS selector before extraction

removeAllImages.description: Whether to remove all images from the output

withLinkSummary.description: Generate a link summary section at the end; true includes only button links, all includes every link

withImageSummary.description: Generate an image summary section at the end

googleLocal.description: Restrict the geographic location of search results using an ISO country code

noCache.description: Whether to bypass cache and fetch the latest result

text.description: Plain text content, mutually exclusive with docURLs mode

systemPrompt.description: System prompt that sets the model role and behavior

fileParsingStrategy.description: File parsing strategy: auto selects automatically, fast parses quickly, and quality prioritizes parsing quality

actions.name: wanx_kf2v_video_submit
actions.description: Generate videos from keyframes with Tongyi Wanxiang

prompt.description: Text prompt describing the video transition process

firstFrameURL.description: First-frame image URL, which determines the video aspect ratio

lastFrameURL.description: Last-frame image URL, used with the first frame to generate a transition video

negativePrompt.description: Negative prompt describing content to avoid

template.description: Video effect template name; prompt and last frame are not required when using a template

promptExtend.description: Whether to enable intelligent prompt rewriting

seed.description: Random seed; fixed seeds can reproduce results

sessionId.description: Task session ID used by result and state actions.

actions.name: wanx_r2v_video_submit
actions.description: Generate videos from reference assets with Tongyi Wanxiang

prompt.description: Video generation prompt; use identifiers such as character1 to reference characters

items.description: One URL accepted by Fusion API.

referenceURLs.description: Array of reference image or video URLs, ordered from character1 to characterN

negativePrompt.description: Negative prompt describing content to avoid

size.description: Output video resolution; explicit width and height are required

shotType.description: Shot type: single for a single shot, multi for multiple shots

audio.description: Whether to generate video with audio; only flash models support disabling audio

watermark.description: Whether to add an AI-generated watermark

seed.description: Random seed; fixed seeds can reproduce results

sessionId.description: Task session ID used by result and state actions.
